episode: Departure from the sack of Troy
notes: Undisputed anchor. Leaves with 12 ships and ~720 men (reconstructed at ~60/ship).

episode: Raid on Ismaros; Maron's wine won
notes: Strong, essentially undisputed ID. Loses 6 men per ship = 72. Cyclopean-walled acropolis on Agios Georgios Hill.

episode: The north wind blows him past Cythera
notes: The geographic hinge. Stanford: last clearly identifiable place before 'Wonderland.' A 9-day drift begins here.

episode: The narcotic fruit that erases home
notes: Traditional: Djerba (Polybius, Strabo). Severin: Cyrenaica, Libya. 9-day drift + landfall.
Traditional: SE Sicily near Etna. Bradford: Favignana. Severin: Crete. Loses 6 men. Curse drives the rest of the poem.
Traditional: Lipari. Severin: Gramvousa, Crete (ancient Korykos = 'leather bag'). Bag opened; blown back from within sight of Ithaca.
Single greatest loss: 11 of 12 ships destroyed with all crews. Only Odysseus's moored ship escapes. Coords = Severin's Mezapos bay.

episode: Men turned to swine; a year as her lover
notes: DETENTION. Traditional: Monte Circeo (541 m promontory). Severin: Paxos. Directs him to the Underworld. Men count reconstructed.
Necromanteion excavated (Dakaris) but ruins date no earlier than late 4th c. BCE; Homeric link now contested. Rivals: Cumae/Avernus (Berard); Atlantic (Strabo).

episode: Bound to the mast to hear the song
notes: Traditional: Li Galli, named for the Sirens since antiquity (Strabo). Severin: Antipaxos near Lefkada.

episode: Six men for the whole ship
notes: Traditional: Strait of Messina (Polybius, earliest source). Severin: Lefkada channel. Loses 6 men (one per head).

episode: The cattle of the Sun; the ship destroyed
notes: Crew slaughter Helios's immortal cattle; Zeus destroys the ship; ALL crew die. Only Odysseus survives. Some link to Malta; Severin: Meganisi.
DETENTION — the single largest block of the decade (~70%). Traditional: Gozo, Malta (Bradford). Strabo/Plutarch: far Atlantic. Berard: near Gibraltar.

episode: Scheria; Nausicaa; the whole tale told
notes: Strong ID since Thucydides 1.25.4. Odysseus sails 17 days by the stars, is wrecked, washes ashore. Narrates the entire flashback here. Obregon outlier: Cyprus.
Home after 20 years. Mycenaean finds support Ithaki. Bittlestone: Paliki, Kefalonia. Diggle/Underhill (2026): Homer never calls Ithaca an island.
